name: @evalops/github-agent
description: Autonomous GitHub agent - Maestro building Maestro

scripts.build: node ../../scripts/clean-paths.js dist tsconfig.build.tsbuildinfo && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && bun build ./src/index.ts --target node --packages external --outfile dist/index.js && bun build ./src/main.ts --target node --packages external --outfile dist/main.js && chmod +x dist/main.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: EvalOps
